title: Large LIMIT in SELECT may abort the query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test2 (ref_id Int32, value Float64 NOT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
SELECT * FROM test2 WHERE ref_id IN (SELECT id FROM test) LIMIT 100;
key_bug_features: Large LIMIT in SELECT query causes abort
